mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_system_log (user_id, user_name, action_type, menu_id, action_detail, remark) VALUES (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{actionType}, #{menuId}, #{actionDetail}, #{remark})

where.if: AND l.reg_dt < DATEADD(DAY, 1, CAST(#{endDate} AS datetime2))

AND
l.user_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' l.user_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' l.action_detail LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%'
(l.user_id LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR l.user_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR l.action_detail LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')

mapper.sql:
ORDER BY
l.user_id DESC, l.log_id DESC l.action_type DESC, l.log_id DESC l.reg_dt DESC, l.log_id DESC l.reg_dt DESC, l.log_id DESC
l.log_id, l.user_id, l.user_name, l.action_type, l.menu_id, l.action_detail, l.remark, l.reg_dt, c.code_name AS action_type_name, m.menu_name AS menu_name
FROM tb_system_log l LEFT JOIN tb_common c ON c.cmm_id = 'AT' AND c.code_id = l.action_type LEFT JOIN tb_menu m ON m.menu_id = l.menu_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
SELECT code_id, code_name FROM tb_common WHERE cmm_id = 'AT' AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY code_id
